raw_consumer_statement: Please I beg someone assist me with the following : late in XXXX I was offered a remote data entry position, little did I know until 4 days later that this was in fact a scammed job employment offer dealing with fraudulent payments that returned and fraudulent transactions that includes equipment and gift cards to activate equipment.It was too late when I realized and they were able to use two of my credit cards one being citi bank and the other capital one. They used my card to make purchases of equipment to use for supposed job employment. How ever days later the money used to cover expenses on the equipment purchased started to bounce back and my accounts were over drawn. I tried to reach out to the hiring manager and the trainer but they started to dodge my messages. This was all done through Teams. I have proof of our conversations and they also took my drivers license and social security information. I know owe over {$15.00} combining the citi bank card and capital one bank card. I am in debt and also still struggling to find another job employment while having student loans to pay. Citi bank is around XXXX k that is over drawn from my own credit limit : they are asking to need the due date amount but that can not be possible due to my current employment status. Plus there should be some kind of help for situations like this. Please someone help me.
